completed_steps.summary: Reclassified the repository as a monolith web application rooted at /Users/edmond/02_BridgeArc_Projects/Internal/Edmond-Moepswa with a dual-worker Cloudflare deployment model.
Rescanned existing documentation, business-planning materials, and _bmad-output operational artifacts to identify stale April 23 docs and current rollout context.
Parsed the active manifests and config files, confirming Next.js 16.2.3, Payload 3.82.0, TypeScript 6.0.2, PostgreSQL, OpenNext Cloudflare, Dodo Payments, PostHog, and Cal.com.
Performed an exhaustive source scan across src/, tests/, public/, cloudflare/, and top-level workflow folders, including nested directories at least three levels deep.
Regenerated source-tree documentation with an annotated repository map, a three-level-deep src/ tree, and notes on operationally important folders.
Regenerated the development and deployment guides to reflect Cloudflare worker builds, dual wrangler configs, smoke verification, and current local workflows.
Regenerated the architecture overview with current public vs payload worker responsibilities, worker-safe PostgreSQL handling, and runtime request flows.
Regenerated API, data model, and component documentation from the current route handlers, collection configs, globals, and component folders.
Regenerated the docs index and project-parts metadata so the documentation set can be consumed as the current brownfield reference.
